## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Boost My School and GrowthX to discuss team restructuring, content generation, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is evolving team structure; Andrej will lead strategy for Boost My School account starting in the new year](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [5 new articles ready by end of day; plan to regenerate old articles with updated company brief](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Sitemap issue identified; simple fix proposed, awaiting tech team review](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Aiming to publish new content as early as next Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Topics

### Team Restructuring at GrowthX

  - [Moving to a pod structure with Andrej as lead for Boost My School account](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Andrej to take over strategy in the new year; Kyle to focus on client operations](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Transition aims to provide more support and move at the right speed for clients](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Content Generation and Company Brief Updates

  - [5 additional articles ready by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Hudson to make final modifications to company brief, create a new version for clear versioning](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Plan to regenerate old articles with updated brief](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Strategy: Generate 2 articles today for immediate review, then 3-5 for Monday review](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Focus on reunion-related content for next set of articles](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Goal: Generate substantial content before holiday break (after next week)](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

### Sitemap Technical Issue

  - [Problem: Temporary sitemap appearing at ProxFi.putmyschool.com](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Solution: Insert custom code in Webflow settings to change to main URL](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - Options:
    1.  Boost My School team to implement fix
    2.  Grant Nika CMS admin access for quick fix
  - [Hudson shared document with tech team; expecting review and answer by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Nika available to assist if needed](https://fathom.video/share/tGGtxqDDKTzoyG3quJkraaj4WEW5WLjz?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
